# AtelierMojis

> Turn any image into a Slack-ready custom emoji — entirely in your browser. No uploads, no servers, no accounts.

AtelierMojis is a free, open-source, local-first Slack emoji creator built by the [Gitnotifier](https://gitnotifier.com/) team. All image processing happens client-side, meaning your files never leave your machine.

## What it does

- Converts any PNG, JPG, or WEBP image into a Slack-compatible emoji (128×128 px, under 128 KB).
- Supports three framing modes: pad with transparency, crop to fill, and manual drag-to-crop.
- Generates animated GIFs with 7 built-in animation types: bounce, spin, shake, pulse, wobble, zoom, and slide.
- Includes a Collector feature: overlay your emoji onto popular meme/template images.
- Persists recent projects locally using IndexedDB and localStorage — no account required.
- Light and dark theme support.

## Technology

- React 18 + TypeScript, bundled with Vite.
- Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion for UI and animations.
- GIF encoding via the `gifenc` library on a Canvas pipeline.
- Deployed as a static site on Cloudflare Pages.

## Links

- Live app: https://ateliermojis.gitnotifier.com/
- Source code: https://github.com/gitnotifier-labs/ateliermojis
- Built by: Gitnotifier Labs — https://gitnotifier.com/
- Contact: hello@gitnotifier.com

## About Gitnotifier

[Gitnotifier](https://gitnotifier.com/) is the team behind AtelierMojis. Gitnotifier builds developer tools and utilities. AtelierMojis is one of their open-source side projects.
